package rulecoverage

func NegativeSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatuses() string {
    ruleID := "same_domain_error_mapped_to_multiple_statuses"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "The same error type being converted to different HTTP status codes in the same module."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
